title: FAIR HOUSING LAWS AND COMPLAINTS - 211info
text: UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE FAIR HOUSING LAWS AND COMPLAINTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Portland Field Office of the US Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) fields complaints about community shelters in Oregon. Shelters are bound by the same fair housing laws as other types of housing, and complaints might include issues of poor maintenance, dangers to health and safety, mismanagement, or fraud. Callers can also report perceived discrimination based on race, color, national origin, religion, sex, disability, familial status (i.e., presence of children in the household), sexual orientation, gender identity, and/or marital status. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 972042825 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (971) 222-2600 0 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 222-2600 ext 0 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in a Federal Building; visitors should be prepared to present photo ID. There are parking structures nearby, but there is no public parking in the building. Services: Shelter Complaints Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE
